mechanism_narrative: A rising 3-month trend in FEDFUNDS tightens discount-rate conditions and reduces equity valuation multiples, so higher recent FEDFUNDS changes predict lower S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the walk-forward coefficient on 3-month FEDFUNDS change is positive, or if high FEDFUNDS-change quintiles do not underperform low-change quintiles over 20-day forward returns.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening residential investment and future household balance-sheet stress, causing lower earnings expectations and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month average by more than 8%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1795.0 thousand units for 2006-07-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and mean triggered returns are not below unconditional mean returns.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS is expanding and UNRATE remains low, household income growth supports consumption and corporate revenues, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE is below 5.0%
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 135500 thousand persons for 2006-08-01
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tight labor markets
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and UNRATE-below-5% state has lower mean 20-day forward returns than all other states across a 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS is already high signals persistent inflation pressure and restrictive policy, raising real discount-rate uncertainty and generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation rate crosses above its 12-month inflation rate while FEDFUNDS is above 5.0%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered high-inflation and high-FEDFUNDS observations have nonnegative average 20-day forward returns and no drawdown-frequency increase versus untriggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in INDPRO signals improving production momentum and stronger near-term earnings breadth, so higher INDPRO momentum predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the walk-forward rank correlation between INDPRO 3-month momentum and 60-day S&P 500 returns is below 0.03 in magnitude or consistently negative over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: An upside acceleration in RSAFS reflects stronger consumer demand and near-term revenue growth for cyclical companies, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth crosses above its trailing 12-month growth rate
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was 368233 million dollars for 2006-08-01
failure_condition: Reject if triggered RSAFS acceleration events do not produce higher 5-day forward returns than nontriggered observations or if hit rate is below the unconditional positive-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: A material rise in UNRATE signals deteriorating labor demand and recession-risk repricing, leading investors to cut earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses more than 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 6-month low
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of cases and average triggered returns are not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Slowing GDPC1 growth combined with restrictive FEDFUNDS indicates demand deceleration under tight financial conditions, causing lower expected earnings and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter growth crosses below its prior 4-quarter average while FEDFUNDS is above 5.0%
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value was 11397.6 billions of chained 2017 dollars for 2006-04-01
regime_hint: late-cycle demand slowdown under restrictive monetary policy
failure_condition: Reject if the combined GDPC1-slowdown and high-FEDFUNDS state has average 60-day forward returns equal to or above unconditional returns in walk-forward testing.
